sourceRef: tip:Three questions to ask before certifying a non-standard term

slides.headline: Master Summer Term Certifications
slides.body: Ensure accuracy in non-standard terms with these key questions.

slides.headline: Review COE
slides.body: Start with the Certificate of Eligibility (COE) form. Verify all details.

slides.headline: Cross-reference with 22-1999
slides.body: Cross-check the student's 22-1999 form for accuracy. Look for any discrepancies.

slides.headline: Verify Summer Term Eligibility
slides.body: Ensure the student is eligible for summer term certification. Check relevant VA guidance.

slides.headline: Consult with SAA
slides.body: If unsure, consult the State Approving Agency (SAA) for clarification.

slides.headline: Document Your Decision
slides.body: Keep records of your certification decisions. This is crucial for audits.
Expand your knowledge with our comprehensive training. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the nuances of summer term certifications with these essential questions. Ensure accuracy and compliance for your students. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the first one, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw attention.
